{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 229 (SB 229) updates state law to include deputy sheriffs in Amador and Nevada counties under the definition of 'peace officer.'",
    "SB 229 enhances emergency response capabilities in rural communities.",
    "Expanding the authority of deputies strengthens their ability to protect and serve communities during emergencies.",
    "The bill recognizes deputy sheriffs serving in custodial roles as peace officers.",
    "Expanding the authority of deputies is essential for ensuring a swift response to emergencies.",
    "The legislation aligns Nevada County with other counties across California in terms of peace officer authority."
